name: Teaching Media Literacy? Start by Teaching Decision-
snippet:
30 Jul 2025 — For content area teachers, decision - making can be taught by designing instruction that makes visible the decisions embedded in disciplinary ...
From managing screen time and avoiding distractions to evaluating sources and shaping their online presence, these everyday decisions reveal a deeper need: to teach decision-making as a core component of media literacy.

name: Decision Education and Media Literacy
snippet: Decision Education helps students develop several real-world skills emphasized in media literacy. These include evaluating information and sources, considering multiple perspectives, and recognizing cognitive biases such as confirmation bias.
